name: sources declared in a consumer's ctp.config.yaml refresh into the project overlay it names with crawl scope passing through
command:
APP=/tmp/cl564-r60-$$; mkdir -p $APP/docs $APP/rules && printf '

T

Team rule one

Services must expose health endpoints.

next' > $APP/docs/index.html && printf '

P2

Team rule two

Deployments must be reversible within five minutes.

' > $APP/docs/page2.html && cat > $APP/ctp.config.yaml <e.err; T=$APP/rules/_project/acme-storefront/_universal/acme-eng-standards.yaml; [ -f $T ] && grep -q 'pages_fetched=2' e.err && grep -q 'team-rule-two' $T && [ ! -d $APP/rules/_universal ] && echo config-sources-refresh-into-named-overlay 1>&2; rm -rf $APP
